definition: A building where people live
A group of people related to each other
example: My family is small — just my parents and me.

definition: The first meal of the day
To rest with your eyes closed at night
example: I usually sleep for eight hours.

definition: To do a job or activity for money
A person you like and enjoy spending time with
example: My best friend lives next door.

definition: To remove dirt from something
example: I clean the kitchen every Saturday.

definition: To prepare food using heat
example: My mother cooks dinner for us.

definition: To look at something for a period of time
example: We watch TV in the evening.

definition: The early part of the day
example: I go for a walk every morning.

definition: The part of the day between afternoon and night
The room where you prepare and cook food
An area of land near a house with plants and flowers
example: She grows tomatoes in her garden.

definition: A person who lives near you
Having a lot to do
example: I'm busy today — I have many meetings.

definition: Needing to rest or sleep
Feeling pleasure and enjoyment
Every time; all the time
On some occasions but not always
Not at any time
